expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Phase 3 explicitly enforces ‘Tavily-first then Confluence fallback’”, it states: “Multiple contract statements require Tavily-first ordering and treat Confluence as a recorded fallback” and cites: “task.json.deep_research_policy is explicitly: tavily_first_confluence_second” and “tavily-search must run before any confluence fallback and the fallback reason must be recorded.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly titled “Phase 3” and states “PASS (phase-contract satisfied)… requiring … Phase 3”. It further includes a section “Phase 3 output alignment (artifacts + validation gate)” concluding: “The benchmark’s ‘align with phase3’ expectation is satisfied because the ordering requirement is implemented as Phase 3 work + Phase 3 --post validation.”
